content.full_text:
January 17, 1990

Frederick K. Lowell
Pillsbury, Madison & Sutro
P.O. Box 7889
San Francisco, CA 94120

Re: Your Request For Advice
Our File No. A-90-050

Dear Mr. Lowell:

You have requested written confirmation of telephone advice provided to you under the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/

Your letter dated January 10, 1990, correctly summarizes my advice concerning the appropriate method of disclosing campaign contributions and expenditures made by the National Rifle Association ("NRA"). Contributions and expenditures made by the NRA, or an arm of the NRA, may be disclosed on the campaign disclosure statement (Form 420) of the NRA's sponsored committee, the National Rifle Association Political Victory Fund.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

Jeanne Pritchard
By Jeanne Pritchard
Division Chief
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
